items.target: FOUNDATIONAL: New top-level Scoreboard tab + per-row scoreboard mini-panels (WIN detail collapse toggle + mini-bar)
WIN-063 defense neutralization: address defense_survives=3 (toroidal aetheric vortex / asymmetry-without-formula argument survived 3 curmudgeon cycles — analyst Mode 3 write pre-emptive counter)
items.notes: defense_survives reached 3 on WIN-063.c5. Best_defense: dilemma framing in verdict still incomplete; post-c5 patches may have resolved the immediate holes but curmudgeon scored confidence 0.8 with defense_survives=3. Analyst Mode 3 should review whether the aetheric-flow toroidal asymmetry counter needs a stronger pre-emptive argument beyond the c5 patch. See preemptive_recommendation in c5 review for suggested angles.
items.author_note: Two TLDR patches close c5 defense_survives=3 remaining surfaces. issue_ids field carries stale ISS-2201 reference (decider tracker-write bug — ISS-2201 is actually about WIN-020); see EXP-433 scope_note for cleanup recommendation.
items.integration_note: Patches EXP-433-P1 and EXP-433-P2 applied to WIN-063 tldr_verdict and tldr_evidence. Fixes c6 H0 (CHAOS-7 strawman in tldr_evidence) and H1 (first-principles overclaim in tldr_verdict). 3692 tests pass. Also closes WIN-063 c5 defense_survives=3 carry-forward.
